analysis_commentary: Regressed vs current best: im_min=0.609, au=2, max=0.36 (vs 0.461/5/0.21). No collapse. Profile similar to rep3 of current best (au=2) — within seed noise of the new basin's typical behavior. warmup=50 doesn't obviously help escape the uniform-attractor. Given current best rep2 itself may be seed-lucky (1/3 runs learn to au=5), this single-run regression isn't conclusive but is not evidence of improvement.
